name: discord
description: Discord channel for your AI assistant — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

bot_token.title: Discord bot token
bot_token.description: Create a bot at https://discord.com/developers/applications and paste its token here.

access_mode.title: Access mode
access_mode.description: Set to 'static' to lock the bot to a fixed allowlist; leave blank for the default interactive pairing flow.

state_dir.title: State directory
state_dir.description: Override where the bridge stores its pairing/allowlist files. Leave blank to use ~/.claude/channels/discord.
